name: Neither Cake nor Candy (Brownies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter together over hot water.
2. Add the sugar and vanilla; mix well.
3. Add the well beaten eggs.
4. Sift the flour and stir in with the nuts and raisins.
5. Bake in a well-greased shallow pan at 350°F for 20 minutes.
6. When cool, cut into squares.
